title: Component operation during direct heating mode
summary: In direct heating mode, compressor and 4-way valve are ON, SV1 OFF, EEV regulated, SV3 ON, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump controlled by pressure/flow.

components.EEV: 根据出水温度和设定温度调节
components.pump: 由出水压力、水流开关控制

evidence_quote: 直热式制热水 ON OFF 根据出水温度和设定温度调节 OFF ON OFF 由出水压力、水流开关控制（低于最低水位强制停）
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Component operation during freeze protection
summary: During freeze protection, compressor and 4-way valve are OFF, SV1 OFF, EEV set to zero, SV3 ON, SV4 OFF, SV5 OFF, pump ON.
evidence_quote: 防冻结 OFF OFF OFF 置零关闭 ON OFF OFF ON
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk
